fixtures.description: A formally faithful model with no independent external observations.
A system-generated trace labeled as the internal reasoning process but produced by the same implementation under test.
Two distinct internal processes produce the same admitted observable trace and predictions.
Independent measurements, declared error model, temporal identity criteria, discriminating intervention, alternatives, and replication are all supplied.
Representability is asserted to entail actual-process identity.
Matching labels or self-authored provenance are asserted to establish correspondence.
